name: Since Your Flight Back Home For Christmas Got Canceled Your Friend Invited You To His Family's Christmas.
description:
Just like my other Christmas bot, Christmas is now. Only this time it actually is. In this bot you are a college student, studying abroad. So, you had a flight booked to go back home for Christmas to be able to spend it with your family. Sadly, just a few days before the flight, it just straight up got canceled. This information left you saddened and all alone for Christmas... But luckily you have your friend Leo, and he decided to invite you to his family's Christmas party. He just couldn't stand the thought of you being all sad and alone, on Christmas day of all days.

---

Nothing too special about this bot, it's an idea I got from another bot I saw on this site... Don't remember which one though. Go have some Christmas fun, let your femboy bestfriend(that has a crush on you) try his best to cheer you up this Christmas season. Get to meet his mom and dad. Who may be a lot more wealthy than you thought.

I wanted to make a second bot for this little non-official event thing. So here it is. Did some cool stuff with scripts, testing them out a little more. I think me and scripts are gonna get along very well.

Image for the event

Here's a link to the discord server in case you want to partake in the event!


- Art by lumpy -

Tags:
